title: Formula - Calculation of a running total (balance)
excerpt:
I would like to calculate a balance (collumne “Saldo”) by taking the balance in the top line and adding or subtracting the numbers in the current line. 
= Saldo top line + “Erhalten” - “Versand an Kd” + "von Kd zurück = …

posts.author: Cornelia (Cornelia Moser)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to calculate a balance (collumne “Saldo”) by taking the balance in the top line and adding or subtracting the numbers in the current line.
= Saldo top line + “Erhalten” - “Versand an Kd” + "von Kd zurück = New Balance (Saldo)

image1347×388 34.6 KB

Is that possible to do?

posts.author: PedroM (Pedro Malaga - monday.com Certified Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Cornelia,

monday.com works horizontally for formulas. You could perform that calculation working with the items in the same row.
Hope it helps,

posts.author: Cornelia (Cornelia Moser)
posts.cookedHtml: So vertically it is not working? I can not summ up a number from the former line with a number of the current line?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here is another topic that you might find helpful: running total

Integrating with integromat.com could also provide a solution.
